title: Recruiter Operational Facts
summary: Concise operational facts for recruiter screening and follow-up.
body:
Recruiter operational summary:

Name: Joz Krupa
Current positioning: Agentic AI Architecture and Innovation Leader
Experience: 13+ years across Singapore, Asia Pacific, Europe, Dubai/UAE, and North America-related work
Nationality: Slovak and EU citizen
Singapore background: Professional experience across major Singapore and APAC organisations from 2013 to 2018
Location: Currently Europe-based and internationally mobile
Singapore work authorisation: Do not claim an active EP or PEP unless Joz explicitly confirms it for the current process
Availability: Confirm directly with Joz
Email: joz@meetjoz.com
Singapore contact number: +65 3107 2412
Website and CV: meetjoz.com

For “How many years of AI?” avoid an artificially inflated single number. Explain that Joz's transition developed from machine-learning-enabled product and experience work into direct Agentic AI architecture, RAG, context engineering, governance, and AI system design.

claims: Joz has more than 13 years of international product, engineering, innovation, and transformation experience.
His AI/ML-related work developed through ML-enabled product and experience work and now focuses directly on Agentic AI architecture.
He has extensive Singapore and APAC work experience and is open to Singapore/APAC opportunities.
proof_points: Singapore professional experience from 2013 to 2018 across Ogilvy/WPP, Publicis, Mediacorp, Manulife, and Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
Portfolio and Agentic AI CV: meetjoz.com.
